title: IFramesTweaker
description: Tweaks How Invincibility Frames are handled to make fast weapons function properly.
body:
## I Frames Tweaker is a simple mod that fixes fast weapons.

### The Problem
I Frames (Invincibility Frames) are givin to entities that receive damage to stop them from being damaged too quickly. **But In Vanilla this doesn't scale with weapon attack speed**, making fast weapons added by weapon mods not very effective since they give way more I frames than they need to.

### The Solution
I Frames Tweaker changes that by making inflicted I frames match the weapon's attack speed.
The I Frames Inflicted by a weapon should last about 75% of the weapon's recharge time, between 5 and 24 ticks.

There is a simple config that might change in the future.
